  • Method Details

    • createAxiomWizard

      public static AtomicOperation createAxiomWizard(IContextRoot root, String label, String predicate, boolean isTheorem)
      return an Operation to create an axiom
      Parameters:
      root - root element in which the new element is inserted
      label - if null the label of created element is the next free label.
      predicate - the predicate
      isTheorem - true if the axiom is a theorem

    • createAxiomWizard

      public static AtomicOperation createAxiomWizard(IContextRoot root, String[] labels, String[] predicates, boolean[] isTheorem)
      return an Operation to create a list of axioms
      Parameters:
      root - root element in which the new element is inserted
      labels - the labels.
      predicates - the predicates
      isTheorem - true if the axioms is a theorem

    • createConstantWizard

      public static AtomicOperation createConstantWizard(IContextRoot root, String identifier, String[] labels, String[] predicates, boolean[] isTheorem)

    • createEnumeratedSetWizard

      public static AtomicOperation createEnumeratedSetWizard(IContextRoot root, String identifier, String[] elements)
      Elements are added in the following order : carrier set, constant, axiom set = {element1,...}, axiom element are not equals

    • createVariantWizard

      public static AtomicOperation createVariantWizard(IMachineRoot root, String label, String expression)

    • createVariantsWizard

      public static AtomicOperation createVariantsWizard(IMachineRoot root, String[] labels, String[] expressions)

    • createVariableWizard

      public static AtomicOperation createVariableWizard(IMachineRoot root, String varName, Collection<Triplet<String,String,Boolean>> invariant, String actName, String actSub)
      Returns a command that creates a new variable with the given invariants and initialization.
      Parameters:
      root - the root of the machine where the variable is created
      varName - the name of the created variable
      invariant - a collection of invariants, possibly empty if no invariants are desired
      actName - the initialization action label, or null if no initialization is desired
      actSub - the initialization assignment predicate , or null if no initialization is desired
      Returns:
      a command that creates a new variable

    • createInvariantWizard

      public static AtomicOperation createInvariantWizard(IMachineRoot root, String label, String content, boolean isTheorem)
      return an Operation to create an invariant
      Parameters:
      root - root element in which the new element is inserted
      label - if null the label of created element is the next free label.
      content - the predicate
      isTheorem - true if the invariant is a theorem

    • createInvariantWizard

      public static AtomicOperation createInvariantWizard(IMachineRoot root, String[] labels, String[] contents, boolean[] isTheorem)
      return an Operation to create a list of invariants
      Parameters:
      root - root element in which the new element is inserted
      labels - the labels.
      contents - the predicates
      isTheorem - true if the invariant is a theorem

    • createCarrierSetWizard

      public static AtomicOperation createCarrierSetWizard(IContextRoot root, String identifier)

    • createCarrierSetWizard

      public static AtomicOperation createCarrierSetWizard(IContextRoot root, String[] identifier)

    • createElementGeneric

      public static <T extends IInternalElement> AtomicOperation createElementGeneric(IInternalElement parent, IInternalElementType<T> type, IInternalElement sibling)
      return an Operation to create an Element with default name and label
      Parameters:
      parent - the element where the new element is inserted
      type - the type of the new element
      sibling - the new element is inserted before sibling. If sibling is null, the new element is inserted after the last element in parent.

    • createEvent

      public static AtomicOperation createEvent(IMachineRoot root, String name, String[] varNames, String[] grdNames, String[] grdPredicates, boolean[] grdIsTheorem, String[] actNames, String[] actSubstitutions)
      grNames and grdPredicates must be not null and have the same length

      varNames and varSubstitutions must be not null and have the same length

      Parameters:
      root - root element of parent file
      name - name of the element
      varNames - variables name
      grdNames - guards name
      grdPredicates - guards predicate
      actNames - actions name
      actSubstitutions - actions substitution

    • deleteElement

      public static AtomicOperation deleteElement(IInternalElement[] elements, boolean force)

    • changeAttribute

      public static <E extends IInternalElement> AtomicOperation changeAttribute(IRodinFile file, IAttributeManipulation factory, E element, String value)
      Change the attribute of a element with a factory
      Parameters:
      value - if value is null, the attribute is removed. Else it is changed

    • changeAttribute

      public static <E extends IInternalElement> AtomicOperation changeAttribute(E element, IAttributeValue value)
      Change the attribute of an element
      Parameters:
      value - if value is null, the attribute is removed. Else it is changed

    • createAction

      public static AtomicOperation createAction(IInternalElement event, String[] label, String[] predicate, IInternalElement sibling)

    • copyElements

      public static AtomicOperation copyElements(IInternalElement parent, IRodinElement[] elements, IInternalElement sibling)
      Return an operation to copy elements into parent.
      Parameters:
      parent - The parent of the new elements
      elements - an IInternalElement array. Elements to copy
      sibling - the sibling element before which the copy should be inserted, or null if the copy should be inserted as the last child of the container

    • createElement

      public static <T extends IInternalElement> AtomicOperation createElement(IInternalElement parent, IInternalElementType<T> internalElementType, IAttributeType.String attribute, String value)
      Return an operation to create an IInternalElement with the given type and a string attribute.
      Parameters:
      parent - The parent of the new element is
      internalElementType - an IInternalElementType\<T\>. Type of the element to create
      attribute - an IAttributeType.String
      value - a String. The value of the attribute

    • move

      public static AtomicOperation move(IInternalElement root, IInternalElement movedElement, IInternalElement newParent, IInternalElement nextSibling)
      Create an Operation to move an element.

      After execute and redo :

      • movedElement.getParent() equals newParent
      • movedElement.getNextSibling() equals newSibling

      After undo :

      • movedElement.getParent() equals oldParent
      • movedElement.getNextSibling() equals oldSibling
      Parameters:
      root - the root element to get context of the Operation
      movedElement - the element to move
      newParent - the new parent of moved element
      nextSibling - the new next sibling element of moved element
